kind: anti-pattern forensic reference corpus — trading-product funnel + grey-zone signal-vendor exemplars
build_method: manual — hand-built from the already-curated tradeorithms/dossier.md and algoriam/dossier.md files in the source repo
companion_memory_note: the memory file is the founder's running IG/FB-ad fast-vet log (auto-memory layer, not edited by this corpus); this directory is the wiki-side dossier-grade counterpart

exemplars.name: tradeorithms
exemplars.pattern: simulated-demo laundered through a legitimate third-party tracker (MyFXTracker) + MLM referral ladder + self-contradicting disclaimer, costumed as a transparent research desk
exemplars.verdict: SKIP-AS-FUNNEL — not legit for research; 6/6 canonical structural-scam markers + 5 aggravating markers

exemplars.name: algoriam
exemplars.pattern: garden-of-forking-paths DoF: one black-box model (model_5) reported as three metric-optimized TP/SL configs (best_return/best_sharpe/best_winrate), no DSR/PBO/CSCV deflation
exemplars.verdict: SKIP — legit incorporated entity (IAM Technologies S.r.l.), grey-zone product, no research corpus exists, one leaked strategy is a black box with a DoF-violation structure

mempalace_note: mempalace MCP was not a live tool in the session that built this corpus (deferred/injected only) — rg keyword search is the reliable path until a future session has a live connection

other_files._README.md: corpus profile, when-to-consult, recall pattern, provenance, relation to the companion memory file

provenance.standing_caveat: D-WEB — ideas only; here the ideas are entirely negative (anti-patterns), zero strategy candidates by design
